member.name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotHelper.Looseness4Stagger
member.summary: How loose the upperBody of the character is made by a newBullet if staggerFall is running (and not falling). Note atm the neck ramp values are ignored in staggerFall.
member.remarks: Default value = 0.0f. Min value = 0.0f. Max value = 1.0f.
